requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz Supply, Type C/F Plug (IANOR / IEC 62368-1)

summary.en: Algeria operates a 230 V / 50 Hz electricity supply with Type C (two-round-pin Europlug) and Type F (Schuko-compatible) sockets — the same system as continental Europe. Wireless and IoT devices incorporating a mains power supply must meet electrical safety requirements under the applicable IANOR NA standard adopting IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety). The product must be designed, tested, and labelled for a 230 V / 50 Hz supply environment. Type A/B (North American) plugs are incompatible. Safety test reports must reference the IANOR NA / IEC 62368-1 framework and be produced by a recognised laboratory. ARPCE homologation submissions include safety documentation for mains-connected devices.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚采用230V/50Hz供电体系，插座为C型（双圆针欧洲插头）和F型（Schuko兼容型）——与欧洲大陆相同。内置交流电源的无线及物联网设备须符合采用IEC 62368-1（音频/视频、信息及通信技术设备——安全）的适用IANOR NA标准下的电气安全要求。产品须针对230V/50Hz供电环境进行设计、测试并标注。A/B型（北美）插头不兼容。安全测试报告须引用IANOR NA/IEC 62368-1框架，且须由认可实验室出具。ARPCE型式核准申请须包含有线连接设备的安全文件。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞採用230V/50Hz供電體系，插座為C型（雙圓針歐洲插頭）和F型（Schuko相容型）——與歐洲大陸相同。內建交流電源的無線及物聯網裝置須符合採用IEC 62368-1（音頻/視頻、資訊及通信技術設備——安全）的適用IANOR NA標準下的電氣安全要求。產品須針對230V/50Hz供電環境進行設計、測試並標注。A/B型（北美）插頭不相容。安全測試報告須引用IANOR NA/IEC 62368-1框架，且須由認可實驗室出具。ARPCE型式核准申請須包含有線連接裝置的安全文件。

standards_or_laws: IANOR NA standards adopting IEC 62368-1 Ed. 3:2018 (electrical safety for audio/video and IT equipment)
IEC 60083 (plugs and socket-outlets for domestic and similar general use — Type C/F applicable in Algeria)
Loi n° 18-04 du 10 mai 2018 relative aux communications électroniques (Algeria) — enabling law for ARPCE homologation scope

summary.en: China operates a 220 V / 50 Hz supply (nominally similar voltage, same frequency) with Type A/I sockets. Electrical safety for ITE and communication equipment in China is governed by GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 62368-1 predecessor IEC 60950-1, now transitioning to GB 4943.1-2022 / IEC 62368-1). CCC certification covers electrical safety for applicable product categories. Chinese devices are often produced for 100–240 V universal input supply, which is compatible with the Algerian 230 V environment, but plug type and safety standard documentation must be confirmed for the Algerian market.
summary.zh: 中国采用220V/50Hz供电体系（标称电压相近，频率相同），插座为A/I型。中国信息技术设备和通信设备的电气安全由GB 4943.1管控（与IEC 62368-1的前身IEC 60950-1对接，现过渡至GB 4943.1-2022 / IEC 62368-1）。CCC认证涵盖适用产品类别的电气安全。中国设备通常生产为100-240V通用输入电源，与阿尔及利亚230V环境兼容，但须就阿尔及利亚市场确认插头类型和安全标准文件。
summary.zht: 中國採用220V/50Hz供電體系（標稱電壓相近，頻率相同），插座為A/I型。中國資訊技術設備和通信設備的電氣安全由GB 4943.1管控（與IEC 62368-1的前身IEC 60950-1對接，現過渡至GB 4943.1-2022 / IEC 62368-1）。CCC認證涵蓋適用產品類別的電氣安全。中國設備通常生產為100-240V通用輸入電源，與阿爾及利亞230V環境相容，但須就阿爾及利亞市場確認插頭類型和安全標準文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 (China, aligned with IEC 62368-1 — electrical safety for ITE and AV equipment)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for applicable ITE product categories
China 220 V / 50 Hz supply; Type A/I plug (GB 2099.1 / GB 1002)

gap.en: The primary gap is plug type: Chinese devices typically ship with Type A or Type I plugs, which are physically incompatible with Algerian Type C/F sockets. Devices must be adapted with a Type C/F power cord or built-in plug, or a suitable power adapter. Safety documentation (test reports and certificate) must reference the IANOR NA / IEC 62368-1 framework; GB 4943.1 CCC certificates are not accepted by ARPCE as equivalent. If the device uses a 100–240 V universal input power supply, the voltage range gap is minimal, but the safety test must still confirm 230 V / 50 Hz performance. Safety documentation must accompany the ARPCE homologation submission.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于插头类型：中国设备通常配有A型或I型插头，与阿尔及利亚C/F型插座物理上不兼容。设备须适配C/F型电源线或内置插头，或配备合适的电源转接器。安全文件（测试报告及证书）须引用IANOR NA/IEC 62368-1框架；GB 4943.1 CCC证书不被ARPCE接受为等同文件。若设备使用100-240V通用输入电源，电压差距较小，但安全测试仍须确认230V/50Hz性能。安全文件须随附于ARPCE型式核准申请中。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於插頭類型：中國設備通常配有A型或I型插頭，與阿爾及利亞C/F型插座物理上不相容。設備須適配C/F型電源線或內建插頭，或配備合適的電源轉接器。安全文件（測試報告及證書）須引用IANOR NA/IEC 62368-1框架；GB 4943.1 CCC證書不被ARPCE接受為等同文件。若裝置使用100-240V通用輸入電源，電壓差距較小，但安全測試仍須確認230V/50Hz性能。安全文件須隨附於ARPCE型式核准申請中。

source.publisher: IEC — International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC 62368-1 source standard); IANOR for Algerian NA adoption

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 4943.1 CCC documentation is not accepted by ARPCE as equivalent to IANOR NA / IEC 62368-1 safety certification. New safety test reports referencing the applicable NA / IEC 62368-1 standard, covering 230 V / 50 Hz supply conditions, are required. Type C or F plug/power cord must be used; Type A/I plugs are incompatible with Algerian sockets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 4943.1 CCC文件不被ARPCE接受为IANOR NA / IEC 62368-1安全认证的等同文件。须出具引用适用NA / IEC 62368-1标准、覆盖230V/50Hz供电条件的新安全测试报告。须使用C型或F型插头/电源线；A/I型插头与阿尔及利亚插座不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 4943.1 CCC文件不被ARPCE接受為IANOR NA / IEC 62368-1安全認證的等同文件。須出具引用適用NA / IEC 62368-1標準、涵蓋230V/50Hz供電條件的新安全測試報告。須使用C型或F型插頭/電源線；A/I型插頭與阿爾及利亞插座不相容。
